EURUSD|SHORT|2026-07-02.macro_summary: All high-impact USD events are scheduled for Thu 22:00 IST. Stronger Average Hourly Earnings, Non-Farm Employment Change, and a lower Unemployment Rate would hurt this EURUSD SHORT trade, while weaker data would help. Lower Unemployment Claims would also help this trade.

NZDUSD|LONG|2026-07-02.macro_summary: US Average Hourly Earnings, Non-Farm Employment Change, and Unemployment Rate at 22:00 IST are the key events. Stronger US data would hurt this NZDUSD LONG trade, while weaker data would help. US Unemployment Claims at 22:00 IST is also scheduled; higher claims would help, lower claims would hurt.

GOLD|LONG|2026-07-02.macro_summary: The US Average Hourly Earnings m/m, Non-Farm Employment Change, and Unemployment Rate at 22:00 IST are the key events. Stronger than expected US employment data would hurt this GOLD LONG trade, while weaker data would help. The US Unemployment Claims at 22:00 IST is a medium-impact event; weaker claims would help this trade, stronger claims would hurt.
